findings.description: Default CSS color variable values (actual RGB defaults) are omitted. The source contains a code block showing the exact default values for all four color parameters. An AI cannot answer questions like 'what is the default value of @mainColor1?' without this information.

Hints for s3 are missing the color variable property names that appear in the first column of the parameters table: @baseColor, @mainColor1, @mainColor2, @subColor. Per V4, property names from table first columns should be included as hints.
findings.source_evidence:
各パラメータの役割は以下のとおり。
**@baseColor** 背景色
**@mainColor1** 前景色1
**@mainColor2** 前景色2
**@subColor** 差し色

findings.description: The source explicitly states that supporting IE6/7 results in increased support cost ('対応コストの増大') in addition to the listed technical constraints. The knowledge file lists only the two technical constraints (icon display, hover pseudo-selector) and omits the cost increase warning that the source presents as a primary consideration.
findings.source_evidence: ただし、IE6/7をサポートする場合、対応コストの増大に加えて、以下の制約が発生する。
